summary: GitHub Actions could not resolve v7 action tags
root_cause: Action versions were asserted without independent verification

summary: Schema tests failed in clean GitHub checkout
root_cause: Tests read generated outputs excluded by .gitignore
fix: Generate EvidencePack from the scenario inside the test
regression_control: test_schema.py self-contained fixture and CLI integration test
paper_impact: None; local test environment had masked missing tracked files

summary: Sequential observations were initially detected as simultaneous conflicts
root_cause: Conflict detection treated earlier telemetry and mitigation values as concurrently active
fix: Added same-class temporal supersession before cross-class conflict evaluation
regression_control: test_real_format_pipeline.py full trajectory and CD=1 integration assertions
paper_impact: Prevented persistent false escalation and inflated conflict-detection result

summary: Historical conflict remained labelled active after final C_t became false
root_cause: The replay stored first detection but did not model lifecycle closure when an adjudication artefact superseded a conflicting source
fix: Added lifecycle-aware conflict history and explicit resolution audit event
regression_control: test_real_format_pipeline.py and test_cli_integration.py lifecycle consistency invariants
paper_impact: State trajectory and scores were unaffected; conflict-report semantics and provisional PC-004 evidence required regeneration

summary: Rapid Pivot pilot SVG contained an unresolved y-coordinate template placeholder
root_cause: A split SVG string used a plain string for y2 instead of an f-string
fix: Interpolated the track y-coordinate and regenerated the SVG and provenance hashes
regression_control: test_paper_assets.py rejects unresolved {y} tokens and parses the SVG as XML
paper_impact: None; detected before Stage 5 packaging, GitHub upload, Colab checkpoint, or manuscript eligibility

summary: Stage 5.5 pilot rows initially referenced an unregistered execution environment
root_cause: The run records were added before the corresponding environment record and no registry referential-integrity gate existed
fix: Added the Stage 5.5 environment record and historical run summaries
paper_impact: None; detected before packaging, GitHub upload, Colab checkpoint, or manuscript eligibility

summary: False Comfort control run referenced a scenario absent from the evaluation scenario registry
root_cause: The control run was registered before a corresponding scenario-registry row and prior validation did not enforce cross-registry references
fix: Added the false_comfort_control scenario record and retained fail-closed registry referential-integrity validation
regression_control: validate_evaluation_registry plus test_repository_integrity.py scenario-count and reference assertions
paper_impact: None; detected before packaging, GitHub upload, Colab checkpoint, or manuscript eligibility

summary: Historical CVE-2024-3400 EPSS value was provisional and blocked manuscript eligibility
root_cause: The normalized fixture had not been independently tied to both the FIRST date-specific API and official daily archive
fix: Added pinned dual-source online verification plus raw-evidence preservation and EPSS ablation
regression_control: test_historical_epss_verification.py and mandatory GitHub/Colab online gates
paper_impact: Stage 5.5 historical outputs remain development history; only v0.5.6-or-later verified outputs may support the EPSS claim

summary: Online historical replay assertion initially referenced a nonexistent report-hash field and the Colab notebook expected an obsolete status label
root_cause: The workflow assertion and notebook were authored against an intermediate output vocabulary before the final public-replay payload was rechecked
fix: Changed the assertion to validate online_report_hash and authoritative_dual_source_verified and added direct regression tests
paper_impact: None; caught before Stage 5.5.1 packaging, GitHub upload, Colab execution, or manuscript eligibility
